contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: skia to milestone 147; variable font support to SkiaSharp and HarfBuzzSharp; Skottie package downgrade NU1605 in Uno gallery; Rework the lifecycle of singleton instances

preview_summaries.rc1: Release Candidate 1 carried Rework the lifecycle of singleton instances.
preview_summaries.p3: Preview 3 carried Drop native builds for pre-.NET 8 Emscripten versions; HBColor struct for proper hb_color_t representation; TreatWarningsAsErrors in binding/ and fix all warnings.
preview_summaries.p2: Preview 2 carried Skottie package downgrade NU1605 in Uno gallery.
preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 carried skia to milestone 147; color font palette support and improve variable font robustness; variable font support to SkiaSharp and HarfBuzzSharp; Linux Bionic native assets support; x64 and arm64 native build support.
